mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE AS actualShiftCode, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS checkIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS checkOut, WORK_MIN AS workMin, OVERNIGHT_YN AS overnightYn, LATE_YN AS lateYn, LATE_MIN AS lateMin FROM HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND YYYYMMDD BETWEEN #{startYmd} AND #{endYmd} ORDER BY YYYYMMDD
mapper.update: MERGE HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 AS T USING (VALUES (#{company}, #{empCode}, #{yyyymmdd})) AS S(COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD) ON T.COMPANY = S.COMPANY AND T.EMP_CODE = S.EMP_CODE AND T.YYYYMMDD = S.YYYYMMDD WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}, SHIFT_CODE = #{shiftCode}, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE = #{actualShiftCode}, CHECK_IN = #{checkIn}, CHECK_OUT = #{checkOut}, WORK_MIN = #{workMin}, OVERNIGHT_YN = #{overnightYn}, LATE_YN = #{lateYn}, LATE_MIN = #{lateMin}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT, WORK_MIN, OVERNIGHT_YN, LATE_YN, LATE_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{company}, #{empCode}, #{yyyymmdd}, #{deptCode}, #{shiftCode}, #{actualShiftCode}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{workMin}, #{overnightYn}, #{lateYn}, #{lateMin}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(s.SHIFT_CODE, '') AS shiftCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), s.WORK_ON_HHMM, 108) AS workOnHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108) AS workOffHhmm, CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS workDayType FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE))

SELECT r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.TARGET_DATE = CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE) AND r.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'OVERTIME'
